hero.description: Each project is developed to represent the essence of your brand, build credibility and generate real results.
hero.imageAlt: Rafaela Rodrigues, founder of Rodrigues Digital

experience.title: years in Technology
experience.description: Experience applied to the creation of efficient digital solutions.

custom.title: custom projects
custom.description: Solutions developed according to each business and its goals.

languages.title: multilingual websites
languages.description: Your business prepared to reach people in different languages.

about.text1: After more than a decade working in Information Technology, I learned that every good solution starts by understanding the problem. Today, I apply this same mindset to create digital presences that represent companies, professionals and projects with strategy, identity and purpose.
about.text2: Every client has a unique story. That is why no project is built from ready-made templates. My work is to understand the essence of each brand and transform it into a professional digital presence that inspires trust and creates opportunities.
about.imageAlt: Rafaela Rodrigues, founder of Rodrigues Digital
about.quote: Strategy, technology and attention to detail at every stage.

technical.title: Technical expertise
technical.description: More than 10 years of experience in Information Technology applied to digital solutions.

strategy.title: Strategic vision
strategy.description: Every decision is aligned with the brand, its audience and business goals.

support.title: Close support
support.description: Transparent communication from planning to project launch.

introduction.first: Every business has different needs. That is why I develop customized solutions that combine strategy, visual identity, technology and experience.
introduction.second: The goal is to build credibility, create opportunities and represent the quality of your business in every detail.

institutional.title: Corporate Website
institutional.text: Present your company with credibility, strengthen your brand and make it easier for clients to contact you.

landing.title: Landing Page
landing.text: Pages developed for campaigns, launches, events and new customer acquisition.

portfolio.title: Professional Portfolio
portfolio.text: Showcase your career, projects and skills through a modern and strategic presentation.

mediaKit.title: Media Kit
mediaKit.text: Present your authority and increase your opportunities for partnerships, sponsorships and business.

seo.title: Initial SEO
seo.text: Prepare your website for search engines and increase its chances of being found on Google.

maintenance.title: Website Maintenance
maintenance.text: Updates, backups, monitoring and continuous support to keep your website secure and working properly.

footer.title: Need a customized project?
footer.description: Not every need fits a ready-made model. Let us discuss your business goals and develop a digital presence designed to generate results.

introduction.first: You follow every stage and know exactly how the project is progressing.
introduction.second: From the first conversation to publication, every decision is made with transparency, strategy and attention to your goals.

promise.title: Close and consultative service
promise.description: Every project begins with listening, understanding and planning.

process.imageAlt: Rafaela Rodrigues assisting a client and following a project on a tablet

meeting.title: Initial meeting
meeting.description: I learn about your story, goals, needs and the current stage of your business.

planning.title: Planning
planning.description: We define the structure, content, strategy and visual direction that will guide the project.

development.title: Development
development.description: The solution begins to take shape through technology, identity and attention to every detail.

adjustments.title: Adjustments
adjustments.description: You follow the project, review the result and request the adjustments included in the planning.

publication.title: Publication
publication.description: I carry out the final tests, required configurations and publication of your digital presence.

support.title: Support
support.description: After delivery, you receive guidance and assistance to use your new solution.

message.label: Support throughout every stage
message.title: You do not simply receive a finished project at the end.
message.description: You participate in decisions, follow the progress and understand how each choice contributes to the result.
